---
title: "Kernel Reference"
---

# Kernel Reference

DPmixGPD exposes a variety of kernels. Each kernel page covers its mathematical definition, conventions, and how it behaves in the mixture model.

- [Kernel index](articles/kernels-index.html)
- [Amoroso](articles/kernels/kernel-amoroso.html)
- [Cauchy](articles/kernels/kernel-cauchy.html)
- [Gamma](articles/kernels/kernel-gamma.html)
- [Inverse Gaussian](articles/kernels/kernel-invgauss.html)
- [Laplace](articles/kernels/kernel-laplace.html)
- [Lognormal](articles/kernels/kernel-lognormal.html)
- [Normal](articles/kernels/kernel-normal.html)
- [Mathematical definitions](articles/kernels/mathematical-definitions-and-conventions.html)
- [Intro with GPD kernel](articles/kernels/introduction-with-gpd-kernel.html)
- [Inverse Gaussian mixture](articles/kernels/kernel-inverse-gaussian-mixture.html)
- [Inverse Gaussian base](articles/kernels/kernel-inverse-gaussian-base.html)
- [Summary distribution backend reference](articles/kernels/summary-distribution-backend-reference.html)
